name: InsightFace — Attendance & Recognition System
summary: Sistem absensi otomatis berbasis face recognition menggunakan CCTV dan InsightFace (512-dimensi). Anti-spoofing, dual camera RTSP, auto-reconnect watchdog, attendance logging otomatis, dan web interface realtime.
detail: Versi PTI-Absensi adalah monorepo mencakup backend FastAPI, web React + Vite, dan mobile Expo React Native — digunakan operasional nyata di lingkungan institutional.

name: Lady Lunaria Eldharia
summary: A personality-driven assistant system that combines identity consistency, practical utility, and operator-facing interaction.
detail: Presented here through the Clawbot visual layer, Lunaria is the public AI face that turns assistant behavior into something memorable and usable.

name: EZVIZ Camera Monitoring & Controlling
summary: Aplikasi desktop Python untuk monitoring dan controlling kamera EZVIZ dengan live RTSP streaming, PTZ, alarm, snapshot, IR LED, dan privacy mode.
detail: Dibangun dengan pyezvizapi, customtkinter, dan opencv-python. Cross-platform dan mengutamakan keamanan lewat login sesi tanpa hardcoded credentials.

name: Procurement Charting Suite
summary: Suite charting untuk visualisasi data procurement pabrik gula (manufaktur). Frontend Vue 3 + Vite, backend Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL.
detail: Mencakup dashboard builder, procurement charting, data source manager, export PNG/CSV, dan template. Digunakan internal untuk kebutuhan pabrik gula.

name: ASTREAM — Anime Streaming
summary: Website streaming anime tanpa iklan menggunakan Consumet API dan gogoanime provider. Dihosting di Cloudflare Pages.
detail: Dibangun hanya dengan HTML, CSS, dan JavaScript murni tanpa framework. Live di astream.pages.dev.

name: VS Code Extensions
summary: Koleksi 4 VS Code extensions: env-bridge, k8s-port-forward-profiles, trustlens, dan Bubblegums theme — semuanya tersedia publik.
detail: env-bridge sync .env ke launch.json/tasks.json otomatis. k8s-port-forward-profiles manage kubectl port-forward dari sidebar. trustlens scan risk level extension yang terinstall. Bubblegums adalah dark theme pink/purple.
